spec_match.rationale: Perfect spec mapping. Evaluates native DOMException and QuotaExceededError instances against four catching patterns live in the user's browser.

interactive.rationale: Excellent interactivity. Features incremental async background filling to prevent main-thread freezing, showing smooth gauge updates and a detailed live event log.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the overall milestone summary precisely.

edge_cases.rationale: Very thoughtful use of async delays to ensure the page doesn't hang during high-rate storage writes.

references.rationale: Includes links, but references ChromeStatus ID 5149595714830336 which mismatches the 6194847180128256 ID referenced by other concepts.

design_system.rationale: Uses all standard custom properties and fits the showcase look-and-feel beautifully.

openQuestions.title: Align mismatched ChromeStatus reference ID
openQuestions.detail: The references section on line 263 points to ChromeStatus ID 5149595714830336. However, the milestone index and other concept siblings point to ID 6194847180128256. Please align this URL so it links to the correct feature dashboard consistently.

summary: An exceptional, highly robust testing lab that fills localStorage asynchronously (avoiding browser lockups) until a real quota exception triggers. It evaluates four catch methods live, details property structures, but has a slight ChromeStatus URL mismatch.
